INF(@spec-agent>@requester): #TicTacToeSpec{types:[#Player{value:#X | #O}, #Cell{value:#Empty | #X | #O}, #Board{cells:[[Cell,Cell,Cell],[Cell,Cell,Cell],[Cell,Cell,Cell]]}, #Move{player:Player, row:0..2, col:0..2}, #GameState{board:Board, turn:Player}], rules:[valid_move($state,$move) <- inRange($move.row,0..2) & inRange($move.col,0..2) & equals(cellAt($state.board,$move.row,$move.col),#Empty) & equals($move.player,$state.turn) & equals(check_game_over($state.board),F), win($board,$player) <- line_owned($board,$player,[0,0],[0,1],[0,2]) | line_owned($board,$player,[1,0],[1,1],[1,2]) | line_owned($board,$player,[2,0],[2,1],[2,2]) | line_owned($board,$player,[0,0],[1,0],[2,0]) | line_owned($board,$player,[0,1],[1,1],[2,1]) | line_owned($board,$player,[0,2],[1,2],[2,2]) | line_owned($board,$player,[0,0],[1,1],[2,2]) | line_owned($board,$player,[0,2],[1,1],[2,0]), draw($board) <- board_full($board) & equals(win($board,#X),F) & equals(win($board,#O),F)], functions:[check_game_over($board) -> win($board,#X) | win($board,#O) | board_full($board)]}
